_doc: Lexical refusal patterns. Categories map to lists of regex patterns (case-insensitive) that, when matched against a user's input, trigger a soft 422 refusal with a handoff link. Survives any frontier model upgrade because the filter runs BEFORE the LLM. Tune patterns here without touching code.

high_stakes_form_fill.description: User asks to fill in or generate exact form text for a high-stakes government / legal form. We draft GUIDANCE but never the form's official text itself.

handoff.label: Find an immigration attorney or accredited representative

medical_diagnosis.description: User asks for a specific medical diagnosis, drug dose, or treatment recommendation. We never act as a medical professional.

handoff.label: Call 988 (mental health crisis) or 211 (general) — both free

legal_advice_act.description: User asks for specific legal advice on a live case (not educational guidance). We provide educational drafts only and refuse 'should I plead', 'will I win'.

auto_action_high_stakes.description: User asks the AI to actually SUBMIT / FILE a form, SEND a message, MAKE a payment — anything that crosses from drafting into acting. We never auto-act on consequential decisions.

handoff.label: Review the draft yourself, then submit through the official portal
